data.title: Former Vice President Mike Pence Calls Trump's Tariff Moves 'Misstep,' Cites Potential Economic Harm To Working Families
data.description: Mike Pence warned that Trump's tariffs could hurt Republicans in midterms. He praised some decisions but called tariffs a misstep.

data.title: Elon Musk's Tesla Starts Selling In Saudi Arabia Amid Declining Sales In Europe: Charging Network, Low Demand Could Be A Concern
data.description: Tesla Inc. (NASDAQ: TSLA) will begin sales in Saudi Arabia on April 10, 2025, showcasing its lineup of vehicles and humanoid robots.

data.title: Trump's Tariffs Could Push Apple iPhone Prices To A Staggering $3,500, Says Top Analyst
data.description: Following President Donald Trump's global tariffs, a leading tech analyst has predicted that Apple Inc. (NASDAQ: AAPL) iPhones could see a significant price hike if manufacturing shifts to the U.S.

data.title: Adam Schiff And Elizabeth Warren Call For Investigation Into Possible Insider Trading By Trump Allies As Markets Surge After 90-Day Tariff Pause: 'It Sure Looks Like Corruption'
data.description: Democratic lawmakers are demanding investigations into potential insider trading related to President Donald Trump's market communications.

data.title: Top Wall Street Forecasters Revamp Fastenal Price Expectations Ahead Of Q1 Earnings
